post.subject: Stop fuckin with me, life!
post.body:
I didnt sleep at all last night. I have too much on my mind. My life is really really shit. I spend all day on my computer talking to my virtual friends, its getting me nowhere! I gotta change this!

I feel im going to look back on this time realise that i wasted every fucking minute. I cannot stand it anymore! Do I even know how to interact with people? Ive lost the will to say anymore...

comments.body: I've been the same way lately. I try and limit my time online now. It may not seem like it, but I spend a lot less time online than I used to.
comments.author: kerrbearblue
